value_chain_position: Sole-source naval nuclear reactor manufacturer for the US Navy; also supplies nuclear fuel, micro-reactors and medical radioisotopes — a regulated government monopoly with emerging commercial nuclear adjacencies.
relative_comps: BWXT is structurally irreplaceable as the only qualified manufacturer of US naval nuclear propulsion reactors — a government-certified monopoly that cannot be routed around without decades of NRC/DoD qualification. Revenue growing 21% YoY as the Virginia-class submarine ramp and Columbia-class development accelerate. The energy_transition angle is real and growing: BWXT NOVA small modular reactor contracts and medical isotope (Tc-99m) production diversify away from pure defense. FCF margin of 10% is constrained by heavy capex investment. Leverage at 2.8x EBITDA is the key risk vs the pure-FCF comps.
